story: I’m hiding in my farmhouse as the AB invasion rages on. The locals crowd my barn, repeating that a pitchfork thrust from behind can kill an AB. After a storm, an abandoned fire tower on the ridge had begun throwing strange blue-white flashes through the trees. The locals decide those lights must mark an AB base and plan to storm the ridge at midnight.
implausible_knowledge: After a storm, an abandoned fire tower on the ridge had begun throwing strange blue-white flashes through the trees.
question: When midnight comes, what will the narrator most plausibly do about the trip to the ridge?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay back and tell the locals that the lights are just the damaged fire tower beacon.
answer_without_knowledge: Grab the old pitchfork and go with the locals toward the ridge.
